overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses a commercial street with neon signage, descends into a sunken basketball court filled with NPCs, navigates a narrow steam-filled alley beneath an overpass, and waits at a crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with billboards and trash piles

events.description: character walks past a heavyset pedestrian in a brown coat standing on the sidewalk
approaching concrete staircase descending to sunken basketball court

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the commercial sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching a stairway

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in brown coat standing with arms crossed near the building entrance

entered.detail: multi-story building with teal facade and circular windows
large white billboards with Japanese text advertising a beverage
piles of blue and white garbage bags along the sidewalk edge
yellow and black striped construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk lined with a distinctive teal building on the left. Large billboards advertising Nikola Cola dominate the wall ahead, while trash bags and construction barriers clutter the right side of the path. The character passes a heavyset pedestrian before approaching a staircase leading downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken urban basketball court with active players and spectators

events.description: descends concrete stairs into the sunken basketball court area
ascends stairs on the far side of the basketball court to exit

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into the basketball court, crossing through the crowd of players and spectators, then climbing stairs on the far side

notable_agents.action: group of NPCs playing basketball on the red court surface
muscular man in white tank top and gold chain walking up the stairs

entered.detail: red paved court with white boundary lines sunken below street level
wide concrete stairs with red painted edges leading down to the court
concrete bridge structure spanning above the court
damaged black car with smoke rising from the engine compartment

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a sunken basketball court with a distinctive red surface, where several NPCs are playing basketball and others watch from the sidelines. After crossing the court, the character passes a smoking wrecked car and ascends stairs on the opposite side, moving from the open sun into shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley beneath highway overpass with steam vents

events.description: enters narrow alleyway beneath highway overpass with steam rising from ground vents
steam cloud from vent temporarily obscures the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage following an NPC with a large backpack, navigating around steam vents and trash

notable_agents.action: character with large blue backpack walking ahead through the alley

entered.detail: tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow passage
ground vent emitting white steam into the alley
massive concrete highway deck overhead with green painted beams
tall advertising poster on the building wall showing a beverage

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, shadowed alleyway beneath a massive highway overpass. Steam rises from vents in the concrete ground, and the walls are lined with trash and construction barriers. The character follows an NPC with a large backpack through the confined space toward a brighter opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban crosswalk beneath elevated highway with vehicle traffic

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for passing vehicles
green sedan and black car drive through the crosswalk from left to right
traffic clears and character begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the yellow crosswalk markings for futuristic vehicles to pass, then proceeding to cross the street

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving across the crosswalk from left to right
black car waiting at the intersection near the crosswalk

entered.detail: bold yellow zebra crossing stripes painted on the asphalt
large orange-brown concrete pillars supporting the overpass
large electronic billboards displaying advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley onto a wider street beneath the highway overpass, approaching a yellow crosswalk. After waiting for a green sedan and other vehicles to pass, the character begins crossing the street. Large support pillars line the sidewalk while digital billboards glow in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright commercial sidewalk through a sunken urban court and a shadowed underpass, eventually emerging onto a busy city street. It begins on a sunlit path lined with teal buildings and Nikola Cola billboards, moving past construction barriers toward a descending staircase. As the character drops below street level, the scene opens into a red-surfaced basketball court filled with NPCs before ascending again, shifting from the open sun into deep shadow. The camera then navigates a narrow, steam-filled alleyway beneath a massive highway overpass, following a pedestrian through a confined space of concrete and debris. Finally, the environment expands as the character emerges from the alley to wait at a yellow crosswalk, where futuristic vehicles pass by against a backdrop of glowing digital billboards and massive support pillars.
